question: Will another company get dropped from the Dow Jones Industrial Average in July or August 2026?

factors.description: S&P just made a change (Alphabet/Verizon, effective June 29); back-to-back changes within 2 months are rare
No scheduled quarterly S&P rebalance in July-August window (June done, next is September)
Active media speculation about Nike removal raises some chance of a credible report
Speculation is 'within 12 months' and consists of opinion pieces, not confirmations of a decided removal

summary: The question requires a NEW announcement, confirmation, or credible report between June 30 and Sept 1, 2026 that one of the 30 current DJIA components will be removed. S&P Dow Jones Indices just completed a swap (Alphabet in, Verizon out, effective June 29, 2026) — the 54th change since 1896 — and rarely makes back-to-back changes within a 2-month window absent a forcing corporate event. No scheduled quarterly rebalance falls in July-August (next is September). Speculation about Nike being replaced by Berkshire Hathaway is real but framed as 'within 12 months' and consists of opinion pieces, not credible reports of a decided removal. Status quo strongly favors NO.
reasoning:
**Forecast: 8% (No)**

The question needs a fresh announcement or credible report between June 30 and September 1, 2026 that one of the 30 current DJIA components will be removed. Key reasoning:

- **S&P just acted**: The Alphabet/Verizon swap (effective June 29) was this cycle's change. S&P Dow Jones Indices almost never makes back-to-back changes within two months absent a forcing corporate event (merger/acquisition).
- **No scheduled window**: The next quarterly rebalance is September, outside the July-August window.
- **Speculation isn't confirmation**: The Nike/Berkshire chatter is real but framed as "within 12 months" and lives in opinion pieces — not credible reporting of a decided removal.
- **Status quo dominates**: A random 2-month window carries ~15% base rate, materially reduced given a change just occurred and no rebalance is due.

Final probability: **0.08**
